title: murdannia citrina
intro: Murdannia citrina, also known as the Lemon Beggartick or Citrina, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and edible rhizomes. The medicinal properties of Murdannia citrina include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Murdannia citrina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Murdannia citrina is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
